execution_scope: Future provider side-effect execution may proceed only for a separately approved bounded provider target; this v8.6 record is preflight evidence and executes no provider call.
side_effect_boundary: No side effect occurs in v8.6; later execution must stay within the approved provider target and operation scope.
redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, provider payload bodies, billing data, or production response bodies are persisted.
rollback_plan: Do not execute if rollback cannot be defined; later execution must include a rollback artifact and stop on rollback failure.
credential_boundary: The bridge does not read credentials; any later provider execution must receive scoped credentials after approval.
budget_boundary: The bridge performs no billable provider operation; later execution must declare a bounded budget before invocation.
stop_conditions: stop if human approval is missing
stop if rollback, credential, or budget boundary is unclear
not_proven: The v8.6 bridge artifact is retained as a corrected blocked preflight because the linked adapter is read-only and the original council review is not an independent human approval record. It does not authorize external writes.
